These roles are clearly related to healthcare settings. Cardiovascular Rehabilitation Units and Emergency Rooms are parts of hospitals. The responsibilities he had—like patient admissions, data entry, insurance verification, and communication with medical staff and families—are typical tasks in a hospital's administrative or patient services department.
